decks.notes: This deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and disrupting your opponent's strategies with cards like Spyglass Siren and Spell Snare. Utilizing strong creatures like Deep-Cavern Bat and Tishana's Tidebinder, combined with support from cards like Enduring Curiosity and Cecil, Dark Knight, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly. Cards like Bitter Triumph and Requiting Hex add additional removal and disruption options, while Wan Shi Tong, Librarian provides card draw. The mana base is varied to ensure a smooth curve. The deck aims to apply pressure and control the board early on to secure victory.

The focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly play low-cost creatures and spells to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. With cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggression. Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics provide additional damage and control options, while Opt and Sleight of Hand help to keep the card draw going. The deck also includes some bounce effects like Bounce Off and Wild Ride to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Ultimately, the goal is to outpace the opponent and win the game quickly.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on utilizing spells, abilities, and creatures to control the board and outwit opponents. The key strategy involves using cards like Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson to deal damage to opponents' creatures and gain an advantage. Monument to Endurance and Abandon Attachments help to protect important cards and maintain card advantage. By carefully managing resources and utilizing counterspells like Spell Snare, the deck aims to maintain control of the game until it can ultimately overpower the opponent with powerful spells and creatures like Ral, Crackling Wit and Gran-Gran.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with cheap, efficient creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off. Burst Lightning is used for removal, while cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand help with card selection and keeping the aggression going. Boomerang Basics and Stormchaser's Talent provide extra value and card advantage, allowing the deck to maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes some bounce and protection effects like Secret Identity and Stock Up to disrupt the opponent's game plan while pushing through damage.

The main idea of this deck is to control the board using a combination of spells and abilities from cards like Gran-Gran, Monument to Endurance, and Accumulate Wisdom. The goal is to outlast the opponent while generating card advantage and restricting their options through cards like Abandon Attachments and Spell Snare. Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique are key cards for dealing damage and maintaining control of the game. Riverpyre Verge and Steam Vents help with mana fixing, while Artist's Talent provides additional utility. Overall, the deck focuses on using Izzet colors to control the game and emerge victorious.

This deck focuses on controlling the opponent's plays through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. It aims to maintain board presence and card advantage while disrupting the opponent's strategy. The key strategy is to outvalue the opponent by efficiently using removal and counterspells to stay ahead in the game. The deck also utilizes powerful finishers like Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique to close out the game once control has been firmly established.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying creatures with low mana costs to apply early pressure on the opponent. By utilizing powerful aggro cards like Badgermole Cub and Fecund Greenshell, along with mana acceleration from Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. Earthbender Ascension and Sapling Nursery provide additional support and synergy with the deck's aggressive game plan. The deck also includes utility lands like Fabled Passage and Ba Sing Se to ensure smooth mana development.

The deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Gene Pollinator, supported by ramp from Llanowar Elves and card draw from Quantum Riddler. Ouroboroid and Spider Manifestation provide resilient threats, while Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Craterhoof Behemoth offer powerful finishers. The deck includes protection and disruption with cards like Spider-Sense and Nature's Rhythm. The mana base allows for consistent access to all colors needed for the deck's cards, ensuring smooth gameplay and versatility in play.

This deck focuses on playing aggressively with a mix of creatures and spells to control the board and apply pressure on the opponent. The key strategy is to quickly build a strong board presence with cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider, while using cards like Deceit and Vibrance to disrupt the opponent's plans. The inclusion of powerful cards like Ygra, Eater of All and Superior Spider-Man provide additional threats to overwhelm the opponent. By efficiently using resources and making strategic plays, this deck aims to win fast and decisively.

This Esper Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures with abilities that trigger when they enter the battlefield or attack. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of early game threats and disruptive spells. Bitterbloom Bearer and Spyglass Siren provide early aggression, while Aang, Swift Savior and Cecil, Dark Knight offer additional value with their abilities. Sygg, Wanderwine Wisdom helps to filter through the deck for important cards, while Shoot the Sheriff and Tragic Trajectory provide removal options. Kaito, Bane of Nightmares serves as a powerful finisher to end the game quickly.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to control the board with a variety of spells and abilities that can deal damage, remove threats, draw cards, and manipulate the opponent's resources. By utilizing a combination of instants, sorceries, and enchantments, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and maintain a strong presence on the battlefield. With a blend of card advantage and versatile removal options, this deck seeks to outmaneuver the opponent and ultimately emerge victorious through careful decision-making and strategic play.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by removing threats and countering opponent's spells while drawing cards and increasing mana efficiency. It utilizes a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Ral, Crackling Wit and Artist's Talent to close out the game once it has established control. Additionally, it includes ways to ramp up mana production and fix mana colors to ensure smooth gameplay.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by countering opponent's spells and managing the board with removal spells like Burst Lightning and Sunderflock. The key strategy is to slow down the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage through card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early game defense, while Glacial Dragonhunt serves as a finisher. The deck also has a mix of bounce spells and protection spells to deal with threats efficiently. Ultimately, the goal is to outlast the opponent and secure victory through efficient use of resources.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build a board presence of efficient and aggressive creatures, utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo to put pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes ramp cards like Llanowar Elves to help accelerate into bigger threats like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer. With cards like Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage for mana fixing and card advantage, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, powerful creature plays while maintaining a steady flow of resources.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with a combination of powerful creatures and efficient mana ramp. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Quantum Riddler to accelerate your board development, you can quickly deploy threats like Badgermole Cub and Ouroboroid to apply early pressure. Additionally, cards like Spider-Sense and Nature's Rhythm help protect your creatures and ensure your mana production remains consistent. With a mix of aggression and resilience, this deck aims to close out games swiftly before the opponent can mount a proper defense.

The deck focuses on utilizing graveyard recursion and powerful combo pieces to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man to fill the graveyard with creatures, and then bringing them back with cards like Requiting Hex and Insatiable Avarice, the deck aims to establish a dominating board presence. The inclusion of Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery allows for alternative win conditions, while cards like Winternight Stories and Duress provide disruption and control elements to support the combo strategy. The deck also includes key lands like Gloomlake Verge and Multiversal Passage for mana fixing and consistency.
